case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. WOODS, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. SERVED DEC-09-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, ROBERT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS, ROBERT SEKIQUCHI, ERIC DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
